prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-PWLUSRAFY-2022-YLW-BUN Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Yellow Walking Robot Transforming Toy Lights and Sounds Boys 3 and Up Description: Fight crime, evil villains, or other enemy robots with Kidplokio's Walking Warrior Robot Toys. Available in an assortment of four colors, red, blue, yellow, and green, your little one will want to collect them all for the ultimate robot battle. The robot toys feature an articulating head and arms, multiple battle cries and awesome laser sound effects, and vibrant red LED lights found throughout its armor and space blaster gun, making playtime even more fun and realistic.

The Kidplokio Walking Warrior Robot Toys move easily across smooth surfaces with built-in rollers under their feet. The simple, easy-to-use design of the futuristic robot allows little ones to engage with their space warrior as it moves forward unassisted. Made of safe non-toxic plastic, these robot toys are ready for an adventure with just x3 AA batteries (not included); no assembly is required.

In one hand of the Robot Warrior toy is a light-up space gun ready for action, and in the other is an adjustable claw that can be easily opened or closed with the press of a button. With an articulating head and arms, the ability to walk and fight on its own, and multiple combat command sounds, the Power Warrior Super Robot Toys will give kids and toddlers endless storyline ideas and hours of pretend play fun.

Suitable for indoor and outdoor use and standing approximately ten inches tall, the Walking Light Up Warrior Robot Toys are the perfect size for ruling the galaxy at home or on the go. Search Terms: Toys for boys stocking stuffers birthday present brother Hanukkah Christmas gifts robots dinosaurs space toys dino cosplay interactive walking toys tyrannosaurus rex holiday toy list 2022 playroom playset paleontology for kids toddlers Features: - TRANSFORMING ROBOT TOYS: Little robot enthusiasts will love these walking warrior robot toys from Kidplokio! Battle against other robot enemies or evil villains for hours of fun intergalactic pretend play, with lights, sounds, a light-up space gun, and an adjustable claw that can be easily opened and closed with the press of a button! - AWESOME LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Kidplokio's walking warrior robot toys feature multiple battle cries and laser sounds, as well as red LED lights throughout the body of the robot and the space blaster too; Made of safe nontoxic plastic, these robot toys are ready for an adventure with just x3 AA batteries (not included); no assembly required - PRETEND PLAY: Have robot battles or fight crime with the ultimate robot action figure! With an articulating head and arms, the ability to walk on its own, and multiple combat command sounds, the Power Warrior Super Robot will give little ones endless storyline ideas and hours of fun - READY TO PLAY: The Kidplokio Walking Warrior Robot Toys easily move across smooth surfaces with rollers under their feet; The simple, easy-to-use design of the futuristic robot allows little ones to play and engage with their space warrior robot as it moves forward unassisted, no support needed! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 8 x 4.5 inches; Weight: 1.30lbs; Colors: Blue, Yellow, Green, Red; Batteries: x3 AA not included; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Yellow Walking Robot Toy with Lights and Sounds
